strengths: Proven dashboard and reporting delivery (Power BI, Tableau)
Quantified impact on efficiency and revenue
weaknesses: No listed Power Automate or Jira experience
improvement_bullets: Developed automated workflows using Python and integrated Jira for project tracking, resulting in a 25% reduction in delivery delays and streamlined operational project management.

Partnered with cross-functional finance and operations teams to analyze transactional data, identifying revenue leakage and optimizing billing cycles, effectively performing functions similar to Revenue Cycle Management (RCM).
Implemented AI-driven data cleaning techniques and automated reporting, providing actionable insights into operational trends that directly supported executive-level decision-making.
Led data validation initiatives across operational and financial datasets, ensuring high-integrity reporting standards for cross-functional stakeholders.
Leveraged experience in managing complex, high-volume datasets to troubleshoot data inconsistencies, ensuring reliable and accurate reporting for business-critical operations.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst opportunity with New York Bariatric Group. I am interested in this opportunity because I am passionate about leveraging data analytics to improve operational efficiency and patient outcomes within the healthcare sector. What interests me about working for New York Bariatric Group is its commitment to innovative systems and high-quality patient care, which inspires me because I believe in the power of data to facilitate better health journeys. I believe my expertise in SQL and Python and my experience in cross-functional operations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex data into business-ready strategies. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified high-value customer segments through statistical modeling and automated reporting, which led to a 300% increase in revenue for those segments over 12 months. This result underscores my ability to directly influence financial health through analytical rigor. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at New York Bariatric Group would allow me to bring my SQL and Power BI expertise to maintain and optimize complex reporting systems. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data validation and collaboration skills. In a high-stakes environment, I optimized complex relational database queries to reconcile testing data, improving data accuracy by 60% and ensuring project stability. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my automation and dashboarding skills in working on the improvement of reporting processes at New York Bariatric Group. I know that my technical proficiency and operational mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
